title: Side Shield Overlay
description: A Side-Shield Overlay for better Visibility.
body:
# Showcase
![Holding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463d6736fefc821c9bff80ca76b3624d94a8d15d.png)

![Blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a86dde5a59ffb24c0cabbde4eeb78e84fe7afa2.png)

## Description
> This Pack increases Visibility while using the Shield.                            
> Players are allowed to utilize this pack in their own modpacks.

[Click here](https://discord.gg/fkCF4MKTU4) to join my Discord.
